name: Crisis Management
description: Agent must sequentially resolve a dependency graph avoiding cascading failure.
input: State vector showing 5 risk nodes, where the root causes systemic failure.
expected_output: Agent chooses action 0 (prioritize) specifically on the root dependency (index 0) to mitigate systemic risk immediately.
evaluation_criteria: Deterministic check if the root node (index 0) was resolved in the first allowed step.
